title: Kenya Gazette Supplement No. 1 - Constitution of Kenya
excerpt: Official publication of the Constitution of Kenya 2010 following its promulgation on 27 August 2010.

title: Kenya Gazette Notice No. 12345 - Presidential Appointments
excerpt: Notification of presidential appointments to various state and national offices as required under Article 155 of the Constitution.

title: Kenya Gazette Notice No. 8901 - County Government Boundaries
excerpt: Formal publication of county government boundaries following the 2012 boundary delimitation by the IEBC.

title: Kenya Gazette Supplement No. 68 - The Finance Act 2023
excerpt: Official publication of the Finance Act 2023 amending various tax statutes including the Income Tax Act and VAT Act.

title: Kenya Gazette Notice No. 4567 - Court Order - Election Petition
excerpt: Gazette notification of High Court orders in respect of the 2022 general election petition challenging gubernatorial results.

title: Kenya Gazette Notice No. 2345 - Minimum Wage Variation
excerpt: Variation of minimum wages under the Regulation of Wages and Conditions of Employment Act.

title: Kenya Gazette Supplement No. 12 - The Companies (Amendment) Act 2022
excerpt: Publication of amendments to the Companies Act 2015 relating to beneficial ownership and transparency requirements.

title: Kenya Gazette Notice No. 6789 - Environmental Impact Assessment
excerpt: Notice of environmental impact assessment for a proposed development project under the EMCA.
